## **TZ1.3. SECTION 3 -- REGULATORY RESULT**

### **TZ1.3.1. DSNA NET GAIN/LOSS ON ACTIVITY IN THE FRANCE TERMINAL CHARGING ZONE 1 IN 2025**

DSNA reported a net loss of -1.5 M€, as a combination of a gain of +0.4 M€ arising from the cost sharing mechanism, with a loss of -1.6 M€ arising from the traffic risk sharing mechanism and a loss of -0.3 M€ relating to financial incentives.

### **TZ1.3.2. DSNA OVERALL REGULATORY RESULT (RR) ON ACTIVITY IN THE TERMINAL CHARGING ZONE 1**

Ex-post, the overall RR, taking into account the net loss from the terminal activity mentioned above (-1.5 M€) and the actual RoE (+1.3 M€), amounts to -0.2 M€ (-0.4% of the terminal revenues). The resulting ex-post rate of return on equity is negative (-2.1%), compared to the 10.5% planned in the PP.

### **TZ1.3.3. NOTES**

#### **TZ1.3.3.1. NOTE 1**

#### **TZ1.3.3.2. NOTE 2**

# **TZ2. TERMINAL CHARGING ZONE - FRANCE ZONE 2**
